entries.source:
Chat Edit: 'Run the benchmarks first.  
The AVX2 kernel is already compiled and committed (76d45d7), so you can validate the 1.8 × speed-up locally without ever touching the remote. That gives you hard numbers right now and keeps the “large-file” problem in a separate, later step.  

After you’re satisfied with the numbers we can clean the history (BFG or filter-branch) or flip the repo to LFS—whatever you prefer—but there’s no reason to let a push-blocker delay the measurement you built the code for.'
